pathogen_relevance: Direct protective factor against influenza and complications
finding_text: CDC says annual influenza vaccination is the most important measure to prevent seasonal influenza
codeblue_translation: Treat current-season patient vaccination as a top protective feature
caution_note: Protective status does not rule out influenza

finding_text: CDC says high influenza vaccination rates among HCP and patients are critical to preventing healthcare transmission
codeblue_translation: Treat ward/facility HCW coverage as a major protective contextual feature
caution_note: Usually ward/facility-level rather than bedside-level input

pathogen_relevance: Older adults are at higher risk of serious complications
finding_text: CDC lists adults 65 years and older among people at increased risk for serious flu complications
codeblue_translation: Escalate review priority for older inpatients
caution_note: Risk for complications, not proof of acquisition

pathogen_relevance: Pregnancy and immediate postpartum period increase complication risk
finding_text: CDC lists pregnant women, including up to 2 weeks after the end of pregnancy, as higher risk
codeblue_translation: Use as a top-tier vulnerability modifier

pathogen_relevance: Chronic respiratory disease increases complication risk
finding_text: CDC lists asthma and chronic lung disease such as COPD and cystic fibrosis among higher-risk conditions

pathogen_relevance: Weakened immune systems are higher risk and may remain contagious longer
source_basis: CDC High Risk 2024; CDC Flu Spread 2024
finding_text: CDC lists weakened immune systems, including chronic corticosteroids, as higher risk and notes some may be contagious longer
codeblue_translation: Use as both a high-severity and prolonged-shedding modifier
caution_note: This affects timing and severity, not just acquisition

pathogen_relevance: Cardiovascular disease and prior stroke increase complication risk
finding_text: CDC lists heart disease and stroke among higher-risk conditions
CDC lists kidney disorders, liver disorders, and metabolic disorders among higher-risk conditions
caution_note: Grouped for pack simplicity; can be split later

pathogen_relevance: Endocrine disorders such as diabetes increase complication risk
finding_text: CDC lists endocrine disorders such as diabetes mellitus among higher-risk conditions
codeblue_translation: Use as a core vulnerability feature

finding_text: CDC lists neurologic and neurodevelopment conditions among higher-risk conditions
CDC lists blood disorders such as sickle cell disease among higher-risk conditions
codeblue_translation: Use as a moderate-to-high host-risk feature

finding_text: CDC lists BMI of 40 kg/m² or higher among higher-risk conditions

pathogen_relevance: Congregate living raises concern for vulnerability and importation
finding_text: CDC lists people who live in nursing homes and other long-term care facilities among higher-risk groups
codeblue_translation: Use as a contextual importation-risk and vulnerability feature
caution_note: Context feature rather than direct biologic host factor

pathogen_relevance: Young children are at higher risk of serious complications
finding_text: CDC lists children younger than 2 years old as higher risk
codeblue_translation: Use only if pediatric inpatient areas are in scope
caution_note: Can be ignored in adult-only deployment
